== Notes for [[Item:Q3023|Q3023]] ==

In Image 2 of the probanza de nobleza of her grandson Diego Lopez de Burgos located in http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/show/135061 it says that Catalina de Polanco was cousin of Don Gregorio de Polanco Miranda.

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-5710843/search/0/Polanco
--------------------
=== GEDCOM Note ===
http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-5710843/search/0/Polanco
=== GEDCOM Source ===
3 JAN 2019 03:17:29 GMT -0500 Matt Hughes Hughes Web Site <p>Árbol genealógico de MyHeritage</p><p>Sitio familiar: Hughes Web Site</p>Árbol genealógico: 336199081-32 Discovery 336199081-32 Catalina Polanco 3 3 JAN 2019 Añadido por medio de un Person Discovery Discovery

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADA121211EFBBFA9822EF79916C5885
geni:6000000009836718519


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
